sections.paragraph:
καταξιοπιστεύομαι (s. ἄξιος, πιστεύω and next entry) imposing by profession of honesty (so Lghtf., w. ref. to Polyb. 12, 17, 1: καταξιοπιστέομαι [Suda-εύομαι]) ITr 6:2.—DELG s.v. ἄξιος.

Lghtf. Lghtf. = JBLightfoot

ref. ref. = reference(s)

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

ITr ITr = Ignatius to the Trallians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 523
